changeSet.author: b.ulrich
changeSet.sql: UPDATE DISTRICTCONTACT SET VISIT_BEGINDATE = CAST(VISIT_STARTDATE AS TIMESTAMP) + case when VISIT_BEGIN_TIME is not null then VISIT_BEGIN_TIME else TIME(0) end, VISIT_ENDDATE = CAST(VISIT_STARTDATE AS TIMESTAMP) + case when VISIT_END_TIME is not null then VISIT_END_TIME else TIME(0) end where VISIT_STARTDATE is not null;

UPDATE DISTRICTCONTACT SET VISIT_BEGINDATE = CAST(VISIT_STARTDATE AS DATETIME) + case when VISIT_BEGIN_TIME is not null then VISIT_BEGIN_TIME else TIME(0) end, VISIT_ENDDATE = CAST(VISIT_STARTDATE AS DATETIME) + case when VISIT_END_TIME is not null then VISIT_END_TIME else TIME(0) end where VISIT_STARTDATE is not null;

UPDATE DISTRICTCONTACT SET VISIT_BEGINDATE = CAST(CAST(CAST(VISIT_STARTDATE AS DATE) AS DATETIME) + CAST(case when VISIT_BEGIN_TIME is not null then VISIT_BEGIN_TIME else PARSE('00:00:00' as time) end AS DATETIME) AS DATETIME), VISIT_ENDDATE = CAST(CAST(CAST(VISIT_STARTDATE AS DATE) AS DATETIME) + CAST(case when VISIT_END_TIME is not null then VISIT_END_TIME else PARSE('00:00:00' as time) end AS DATETIME) AS DATETIME) WHERE VISIT_STARTDATE IS NOT NULL;

UPDATE DISTRICTCONTACT SET VISIT_BEGINDATE = to_date (to_char (VISIT_STARTDATE,'YYYYMMDD') || case when VISIT_BEGIN_TIME is not null then to_char(VISIT_BEGIN_TIME,'HH24MI') else '0000' end, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), VISIT_ENDDATE = to_date (to_char (VISIT_STARTDATE,'YYYYMMDD') || case when VISIT_END_TIME is not null then to_char(VISIT_END_TIME,'HH24MI') else '0000' end, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') where VISIT_STARTDATE is not null;
